title: Did Apple Outsource Siri's Brain to Google and Nvidia?
summary: Following WWDC 2026, claims spread that Apple completely replaced Siri with Google Gemini and compromised user privacy by sending data to Google Cloud. Investigation reveals Apple did co-develop new models with Google and uses Nvidia chips in Google Cloud, but strict cryptographic firewalls via 'Private Cloud Compute' ensure neither Google nor Apple can access user data.

title: Fast Food Apps Caught Using AI 'Loyalty Penalty' Pricing
summary: Major fast food and delivery apps are utilizing AI to implement 'surveillance pricing', charging loyal customers higher prices for the exact same meals based on their order history, location, and app data.

title: Evaporation vs. Leakage: The Real Reason Delhi Is Out of Water
summary: An exhaustive analysis of Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta's viral claim that water 'evaporates on the way' reveals a stark divergence between open-channel conveyance reality and closed-conduit distribution mechanics. While open canals bleed up to 30% of raw water into the atmosphere and soil, the primary driver of household dry taps is not solar evaporation, but a catastrophic 45% to 53% Non-Revenue Water loss driven by decaying infrastructure and organized theft.
